passages.heading: List of determinatives
passages.text:
The following is a thorough (but necessarily incomplete) list of the lexical items that would be classified as determinatives by CGEL. See for details about determinatives and DPs.

The numerals here are given up to 20, and then by tens and hundreds, but all the numerals belong to the category. (They also belong to the category of nouns. See Reynolds (2026) for more about number words.)

3

- a/an

- a certain

- a few

- a little

- all

- another

- any

- anybody

- anyone

- anything

- anytime

- anywhere

- both

- certain

- each
